notes: Solid, feature-complete Tetris with SRS wall kicks, hold, ghost piece, DAS/ARR, back-to-back, combo scoring, and level progression; minor visual quirk with the ghost piece drawing as an outline rather than a translucent filled block, and the hard-drop trail logic is slightly rough, but overall a high-quality implementation with no apparent JS errors.

An absolutely flawless implementation of modern Tetris guidelines, including 7-bag randomization, hold piece, ghost piece, SRS kicks, lock delay, DAS/ARR tuning, and a complete presentation with sound effects.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with hold, ghost, wall kicks, scoring, and polish, but it has some standards/logic rough edges like combo scoring from the first clear, non-ideal simultaneous left/right handling, and a few implementation quirks that keep it from being near-perfect.
